organization.name: Zynovax
organization.description: Zynovax is an integrated brand growth agency that engineers connected systems — visual identity, social media management, and performance marketing — that scale revenue predictably for ambitious enterprises.

services.name: Visual Identity
services.description: Premium logo systems, brand guidelines, and visual consistency engineered for trust and recognition.

services.name: Social Media Management
services.description: Performance-led social media management with content strategy, community building, and lead generation.

services.name: Performance Marketing
services.description: Paid acquisition engines on Google and Meta, engineered for qualified pipeline and compounding ROAS.
